name: Idaho work injury—no doctor yet, what happens?

mainEntity.name: Idaho work injury—no doctor yet, what happens?

acceptedAnswer.description: Must seek medical ASAP and tell provider work-related for Form 123; delays hurt claim.[4][5] Report employer first within 60 days.[4] Key factors: Prompt care starts process. Practical guidance: Choose authorized doc; get reports. Untreated claims weaken.[5] Benefits cover care.[4]
